title: Our Vision - Diocese of Manchester
headings: h2: What are you looking for?
h2: Sign up for our newsletter
text_excerpt: Our Vision - Diocese of Manchester Skip to content Directory Safeguarding Find a Church Vacancies Contact Donate Our Diocese About Us Learn more about who we are, the people behind our mission, and how our diocese is structured and supported. Our Vision Our shared goals and priorities for the future of the diocese. What’s On News & Events from across our Diocese About Us Information about our Bishops, structures, vision and strategy. Bishops Meet our bishops and discover their leadership, ministry, and role in guiding our diocese. Archdeacons Find out more about our the ministry of our three Archdeacons. Our Structure Understand the roles and responsibilities of senior clergy and how our diocese is organised. Our Staff Get to know the dedicated team supporting our churches, parishes, and wider communities. Governance Find out how decisions are made and who provides oversight across our operations. Registry Find out about the registry which provides support for legal matters and queries within our diocese. Our Schools Learn about our church schools and their vital role in shaping lives and supporting our mission. Cathedral Discover more about Manchester Cathedral – a place of history, prayer, and community. Parish Records Access guidance on managing, storing, and retrieving parish records. Our Vision Our Vision for 2030, including Growing Younger, Church Planting and Revitalisation, Developing Missional Leaders, and Parish Renewal. Parish Renewal Working closely with our parishes to understand the opportunities and challenges they face and make sure they have access to the support they need. Growing Younger Engaging with children, young people, and their families across the diocese, with a particular focus on strengthening the links between our churches and church schools. Church Planting & Revitalisation Establishing mission-focused churches across the diocese especially in communities where attendance is low. Developing Missional Leaders Investing in our clergy, developing our lay people and supporting vocations so we develop missional leaders with the calling and skills to grow our churches. Net Zero Carbon Collaborating with our churches and schools as they measure their energy use and take practical steps to reduce their carbon footprint. Racial Justice Supporting Global Majority Heritage communities and ensuring our clergy and lay leaders represent the diversity of our diocese Disability Friendly Continuing our commitment to accessibility and inclusion, ensuring that people with disabilities are welcomed, supported and able to participate fully in the life of our churches, chaplaincies and schools. What’s On News Stay informed with the latest stories and updates from across the diocese. Events Explore upcoming gatherings, services and opportunities to connect. Notices Important announcements about those ministering within our diocese. Films & Photos Browse highlights from recent events and activities. Podcasts Listen to inspiring talks, interviews, and reflections. Thought for the Day Short reflections to encourage and uplift your day. Our Diocese Manchester Diocese serves a vibrant, dynamic and creative community in the North West of England. Read more Faith and Calling Vocations Exploring where God may be calling you in life and ministry. Exploring Faith Learn more about the Christian faith. Life Events Guidance and support for key moments in life’s journey. Vocations What is My Calling? Helping you discern your gifts and direction in life. Lay Ministries Information and resources to help authorised and licensed lay ministers in their ministry and mission Considering Ordination I think God may be calling me to serve as an ordained minister – so now what? What next? Exploring Faith Find a Church Locate a church near you to worship and connect. Prayer Community Join with others in prayer for our world and our Church. Discipleship Resources Tools and guides to help you grow in faith. Church Calendar Key dates and seasons i

campaigns.title: Parish Renewal
campaigns.summary: At the heart of this support is our commitment to parish renewal , providing specialist, practical help to ensure the missional and financial sustainability of our parishes. This includes financial support for those wishing to establish New Worshipping Communities. Our aim is to ensure that every parish is equipped to thrive and serve its local community.

campaigns.title: Growing Younger
campaigns.summary: We are deepening our commitment to growing younger , nurturing children and young people on their discipleship journey. Building on the success of the Places Project in Bolton and the Man Dio Growing Faith programme across the rest of our diocese, the Encounter Project will provide additional children’s and youth workers, while the Equip training initiative will support lay and ordained leaders so they grow in confidence and develop their skills in ministry with children and young people.

campaigns.title: Church Planting and Revitalisation
campaigns.summary: Alongside this, we are focused on church planting and revitalisation through strengthened partnerships with our existing resource churches and the Antioch Network. Six new resource churches representing a range of traditions will also be established and supported in planting new churches over the next eight years.

campaigns.title: Developing Missional Leaders
campaigns.summary: We are building on the work that is already taking place to bring forward and develop the next generations of missional ordained and lay leaders at every stage of their vocation, including a new, diverse generation of leaders equipped to grow faith communities.
